content.text:
Yes. The reason the “search/palette” disappears is that `CommandPalette` was set to **auto-close on any click outside the modal** (including navbar buttons, because they’re behind the overlay).

I fixed it by removing the backdrop auto-close.

### Change made
- `src/components/CommandPalette.tsx`
  - Removed: `onMouseDown={() => setOpen(false)}` from the full-screen overlay.

### Result
Now the command palette will stay open when you press navbar buttons. It will still close on:
- `Esc`
- clicking a result
- clicking the “Esc” button

Verified with `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.
